definition:
1. to make of copper  or (generally) of metal, to forge , (Iliad by Homer), etc.:—;Mid. to forge for oneself , (Theognis Elegiacus):—;Pass. to be wrought  or forged , (Aristophanes Comicus) 
2. absolute to be a smith, work as a smith, ply the hammer , (Aristophanes Comicus); τὸ χαλκεύειν the smith's art , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
